analysis.seasonal_notes: Google Trends indicates seasonal patterns in MG Road searches. Rising queries show emerging interest in automotive pricing (MG vehicles), dining experiences (Kai, Tandoor, Muro restaurants), and hospitality (Four Seasons, Airbnb). These suggest seasonal peaks around festival seasons, weekends, and travel planning periods. Recommend creating seasonal content around dining guides during festive seasons and lifestyle content during peak tourism/travel planning months (Nov-Dec, Mar-Apr).
